final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) lifestyle content.

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium, cohesive aesthetic suitable for female wellness lifestyle content — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a standard 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows) with clear boundaries between each cell for easy cutting into 9 separate images; each cell must have complete centered content with no text near split lines; visible spacing or thin borders between cells
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with the following content:
  Cell 1 (Cover): main title "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", with soft bed, moon, pillow, sleep mask elements
  Cell 2: title "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", body "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", with phone, moon, sleepy face illustration
  Cell 3: title "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", body "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", with bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains
  Cell 4: title "3. 房间温度别太高", body "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", with AC, thermometer, blanket
  Cell 5: title "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", body "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", with coffee cup, tea cup, no symbol
  Cell 6: title "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", body "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", with bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Cell 7: title "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", body "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", with notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Cell 8: title "7. 固定上床时间", body "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", with clock, moon, bed
  Cell 9: title "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", body "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", footer "收藏这组，今晚试试看", with breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: must be cream white, light beige, pale oat, light caramel as main tones with dark brown text; ins-style, healing sleep therapy theme; minimalist layout with light skeuomorphic illustrations
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, healing, sleep-therapy atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must include cream white, light beige, pale oat, light caramel as main tones with dark brown text accents — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium editorial/magazine quality surface — exact grain and finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as specified in Subject field above; all text must be Chinese, clear and readable, no garbled characters, no English
Constraints: must preserve 3×3 grid structure for easy cutting; each cell must be independently postable; no text near grid lines; large readable typography; comfortable white space; unified visual style across all 9 cells; professional new media design aesthetic; no cheap marketing feel; no excessive decoration
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing aesthetics, excessive ornamentation, English text, garbled characters, text overlapping grid boundaries
